name: Shrimp Scampi in Mushroom Cap
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the butter, garlic, and parsley.
2. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
3. Purchase mushroom caps that are about the size of a half dollar.
4. Wash the caps and remove the stems, setting them aside for another use.
5. Fill each mushroom cap with 1 tiny shrimp or cut a larger shrimp in half.
6. Peel and devein the shrimp.
7. Insert the shrimp into the mushroom caps.
8. Pipe a small rosette of butter into each mushroom cap.
9. If there is any butter left, squeeze it onto the baking sheet.
10. Bake in a preheated oven at 400°F for 15-20 minutes, or until the shrimp are pink and the butter is melted.
11. Serve on slices of French or Italian bread to soak up the butter. Enjoy!
